Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to understand what is given A sequence of timestamped events with actions like FOCUS TYPING SAVE SWITCH and each event has associated attributes like App Window and sometimes additional details

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The key objectives are Transform raw system log into event log format Group events into coherent cases Standardize activity names Include required attributes Create a coherent narrative and Explain the logic behind case grouping and activity naming

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user starts with Microsoft Word Quarterly Report docx then switches to Document1 docx works there switches to Chrome for email then to Adobe Acrobat then to Excel back to Word and finally to Quarterly Report docx

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Possible case identification approaches By document work item Each document could be a case By application session Each continuous use of an application could be a case By logical work unit Grouping related activities across applications that contribute to a single work objective

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This suggests multiple work items Working on Document1 docx with email interaction Working on Quarterly Report docx Working on Report Draft pdf Working on Budget 2024 xlsx

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The email interaction seems related to Document1 docx since the user was working on Document1 docx then switched to email to reply about Annual Meeting which might be related to the document Similarly the Adobe Acrobat session seems related to Report Draft pdf which might be part of the same work as Document1 docx

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: Alternative approach Maybe all these activities are part of one big work session on a quarterly report project with multiple documents involved

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This seems plausible because the user starts with Quarterly Report docx then works on Document1 docx then handles email about Annual Meeting then works on Report Draft pdf then works on Budget 2024 xlsx then returns to Document1 docx and Quarterly Report docx

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So perhaps all these events belong to a single case Quarterly Report Preparation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This makes sense from a process perspective the user is working on a quarterly report project using multiple documents and applications as part of that single work effort

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now assign activities For each event determine what activity it represents in the context of this case

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Open Quarterly Report Open Draft Document Type Document Draft Save Document Switch to Email Open Email Review Email Reply to Email Type Email Response Send Email Switch to PDF Review Review PDF Highlight PDF Content Open Budget Spreadsheet Update Budget Figures Save Spreadsheet Close Document

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: But we need to be more specific where possible For example when opening Document1 docx it is specifically Open Draft Document when working on Quarterly Report docx it is Open Quarterly Report Let me refine the activity names to be more specific

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This seems to create a coherent narrative of working on a quarterly report with multiple documents and applications used as part of that single work effort

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now let us verify if this makes sense for process mining All events belong to one case this is fine if the entire session is about one work item The activities are standardized and meaningful The sequence shows a logical flow of work

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Alternative approach could be to have multiple cases if the work is truly separate but given the context all seems related to preparing a quarterly report one case makes sense

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case Identification Logic I grouped all events into a single case titled Quarterly Report Preparation because the activities form a coherent narrative of working on a quarterly report project and all activities appear to be part of a single work session focused on preparing a quarterly report

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Naming Logic I standardized the raw actions into higher level process steps FOCUS on a document becomes Open or Return TYPING becomes Type SAVE becomes Save SWITCH becomes Switch to CLICK becomes specific verbs like Open Email and Reply to Email and SCROLL and HIGHLIGHT become Review and Highlight
